scope: Step04 B-FULL Laue tracked diffracted focal-plane crossings (EM-attenuated, within the Be window) replayed as a MEGAlib EventList at the new_geo_re detector injection plane. Uses focal_crossings.csv, not the analytic phase_space.csv projection, so the focused flux is not overcounted. This does not add optics-mass prompt/delayed activation.
optics_model: B-FULL external per-ring XOP/CRYSTAL rocking-curve map; standard Geant4 EM competing with finite-MFP Laue diffraction; handoff = tracked diffracted focal crossings

bridge.coordinate_policy: x/y opticsim mm scaled to cm; z at science_beam_z_cm; direction reverse_z
